name: strong-resume-en
jobDescription: Senior AI Product Manager, enterprise GenAI platform. Requirements: own AI/LLM strategy, drive experimentation and KPI loops, partner cross-functionally, improve enterprise trust and governance, explain evaluation and reliability tradeoffs.
candidateProfile: Senior Product Manager with 7 years in enterprise SaaS. Led AI assistant launches, owned KPI reviews and experimentation, partnered with legal, security, engineering, and GTM on enterprise admin controls, and can explain retrieval quality, evaluation metrics, and latency tradeoffs.

name: specific-zh
jobDescription: AI 产品经理校招岗位。需要理解 AI 产品、做过实验、能快速做 Demo，并参与过真实用户场景的 AI 应用落地。
